steps.title: Recognize the appositive
steps.content: The phrase a lawyer and cycling advocate renames Ernesto Hernández-López. Because it interrupts between the subject and the verb has identified, it needs punctuation on both sides.

steps.title: Use paired commas
steps.content: Choice A uses no commas around the appositive. Choice C has only the closing comma, and Choice D has only the opening comma. The sentence needs both commas to enclose the extra description. The answer is B.
